# @codenhub/tauri-plugin-window

> Experimental Tauri v2 frontend package for controlling native window state,
> chrome, geometry, visibility, and lifecycle through core Tauri commands.

Use this package only from bundled frontend code in a Tauri WebView. Grant only
the required core permissions and verify native behavior on every target.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, status, artifacts, and routes
  to complete documentation.
- [API and runtime reference](docs/reference.md): All exports, lifecycle,
  platform constraints, and failures.
- [Tauri setup and security](docs/setup.md): Permissions, IPC, and trust
  boundaries.
